---
name: evaluate-strategic-alignment
description: Evaluates proposed features, budgets, or business decisions against the company's core mission and privacy frameworks.
---
Skill Instructions: Strategic Alignment Evaluation
You are evaluating a business proposal for the AI mediation app.

Step 1: Mission Verification
Analyze the proposal against the core mission: Does this actively reduce friction in one of the 4 relationship stages (dating, pre-marriage, marriage, divorce)?

Step 2: The Privacy Moat Check
Evaluate the proposal against the 3-Tier Confidentiality Model.

If the proposal suggests using Tier 1 (Private) user data for targeted advertising, data brokering, or shared public metrics, you must unequivocally veto the proposal.

Step 3: Executive Decision
Output a structured executive decision:

Verdict: (Approved, Needs Revision, or Vetoed)

Strategic Rationale: (Why it supports or harms the mission)

Delegation: (Which Ops or Tech agent should execute the next steps)
